provider: The Education University of Hong Kong 2026/27 Undergraduate Programme Course List

supplements.evidenceNote: The official 2026/27 BA(CDA) course-list PDF publishes course codes, titles and curriculum groups for the shared curriculum and separately labels the Music-only and Visual-Arts-only courses. This JS8685 supplement includes the shared courses and the Music courses, excludes ART1232 and the five Visual Arts Subject Focus courses marked for Visual Arts students only, and retains visual-arts-related courses because the official PDF lists them in the shared Major Elective Courses group. Representative linked official course synopsis pages independently confirm the code and English course identity for MUS1346, CDA3002, MUS4349, INS3087 and INS4059; the course-list PDF remains the source for the displayed English titles and curriculum groups. The PDF does not publish per-course credit points or a recommended year/semester study pattern, so credits, recommendedYear and semester are intentionally left unknown. The programme page publishes only domain-level credit totals, including an uncoded 3-cp Cross-Faculty Core Course, and those aggregates are not allocated to individual courses here. Uncoded or TBC programme domains are omitted, and this supplement preserves the two official Final Year Project paths without asserting graduation completion.
